title: Aurora Backgrounds and Glassmorphism with Pure CSS
description: A dark, themeable design system built from CSS custom properties, animated gradient orbs, and backdrop-filter glass — no images required.

title: Building a Game AI Agent in Vanilla JavaScript
description: A finite state machine plus utility scoring gives a farming-game bot that plants, waters, harvests, and sells on its own.

title: Clean Architecture in Flutter: Layers That Scale
description: Separating presentation, domain, and data in a Flutter app so it stays testable and easy to change as it grows.

title: Fine-Tuning LLMs with LoRA: A Practical Walkthrough
description: What low-rank adapters are, why they cut memory cost dramatically, and how I train, merge, and ship a custom language model.

title: Adding a Real Backend to a Static Site with Supabase
description: Contact forms, a content vault, and Row Level Security on a static site — using Supabase and Postgres without running a server.

title: Building a PWA with Service Workers: Offline-First in Plain JavaScript
description: How I made my portfolio installable and offline-capable using a Service Worker, cache strategies, and a web app manifest — no frameworks.

title: Building KingCraft: A 3D Voxel Game in the Browser
description: How I built a Minecraft-like voxel game using Three.js with chunk-based rendering, block physics, and keyboard controls.

title: Portfolio Optimization: From 72 to 85 in One Day
description: How I optimized a portfolio site with WebP images, SEO structured data, accessibility fixes, and performance tuning.
